Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to create a BPMN like textual process model based on interview transcripts from an Accounts Payable AP invoice approval process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me analyze the key information from each interview

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Interview 1 Mary AP Clerk Start Receive invoice usually by email Step 1 Check if valid PO number exists If no PO Send it back to supplier requesting details If yes PO Log in system Step 2 Forward to Purchasing to confirm goods services received Step 3 Get confirmation back Step 4 Match invoice line items against PO If matches Send to Department Manager for approval If discrepancy pricing missing items Email Purchasing to clarify If cannot resolve easily Escalate to Supervisor Step 5 After manager approval and issues resolved Schedule for payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Interview 2 Dan Purchasing Officer Receives invoice from AP Check if invoice details match PO quantities prices delivery charges If off contact supplier directly or ask AP to hold until corrected version If PO missing tell Mary she needs to get info before proceeding never approve without PO If correct send confirmation email to AP Assumes after confirmation goes to Manager then back to AP for payment scheduling

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Interview 3 Carlos Department Manager Last step after PO match and Purchasing confirmation Gets notification with invoice details PO confirmation If good Approve in system If suspicious big difference unexpected items Reject or ask Mary to hold and investigate After approval Goes back to AP for payment cycle

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Interview 4 Rita AP Supervisor Handles exceptions Mary cannot match invoice Purchasing has issue missing info unresolved discrepancy Creates retrospective PO for informal services or decides rejection After clearing exceptions back to normal flow Purchasing confirmation Manager approval Payment scheduling

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Interview 5 Karen Supplier Relationship Manager Looped in when invoice does not match terms Helps resolve missing PO number and pricing discrepancy Does not do system approvals just facilitates resolution

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Process flow structure Main Flow 1 Receive Invoice AP Clerk 2 Check for PO number Gateway No PO Request details from Supplier loop back or Escalate Handle exception Yes PO Log in system 3 Forward to Purchasing for confirmation 4 Purchasing checks against PO Missing PO info Request from AP Clerk loop Discrepancy Contact supplier or hold exception path OK Confirm to AP 5 AP matches invoice to PO Discrepancy Email Purchasing if unresolved escalate to Supervisor OK Send to Manager 6 Manager approval Reject Hold Investigation loop back Approve Return to AP 7 Schedule Payment AP

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually looking at Rita interview invoices that do not match any PO may trigger retrospective PO creation or rejection so the No PO path has two possibilities send back to supplier to add PO or escalate to Supervisor

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Let me reconsider the No PO path

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mary says send it back to the supplier requesting more details Rita says sometimes we have invoices that do not match any PO and she works with department heads to create a retrospective PO or decide if the invoice should be rejected Dan says if the PO number is missing Mary needs to get that information before he can proceed

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So lets structure the main process and describe the happy path first then exception flows

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Happy Path Receive Invoice Check PO Validity Log Invoice in Accounting System Forward to Purchasing for Confirmation Verify Receipt and PO Details Send Confirmation to AP Match Invoice to PO Submit for Manager Approval Review and Approve Invoice Return to AP Schedule Payment End Payment Scheduled

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exception 1 Missing PO AP Clerk sends back to Supplier requesting PO details loop or escalates to AP Supervisor for retrospective PO creation or rejection Exception 2 Discrepancy at Purchasing Purchasing contacts Supplier directly or asks AP to hold Supplier Relationship Manager may be involved Exception 3 Discrepancy at AP Matching AP Clerk emails Purchasing and if unresolved escalates to AP Supervisor Exception 4 Manager Rejection Manager rejects or asks AP to hold and investigate
